name: @borjie/tab-as-loop
description: Tab as Loop (Wave M5) — every tab is a server-anchored long-running loop. Lifecycle state machine (opening → hydrating → active → paused → expiring), client→server delta sync, hydration protocol on reopen, hash-chained audit. Closing pauses the loop; reopening rehydrates from the last committed snapshot. See Docs/DESIGN/TAB_AS_LOOP_SPEC.md §12-19.
